perturbation.original_text: 13. RELEASE. As consideration for being permitted by Kitty Haven to participate in activities and provide Services, I hereby agree that I, my assignees, heirs, distributees, guardians, and legal representatives will not make a claim against, sue, or attach the property of Kitty Haven Sanctuary of Utah for injury or damage resulting from any act, omission, negligence or other acts, howsoever caused, by any employee, agent, contractor, or representative of Kitty Haven as a result of my participation in activities and performance of the Services and any A -V Recordings. I here by release Kitty Haven from all actions, claims, or demands that I, my assignees, heirs, distributees, guardians, and legal representatives now have or may hereafter have for injury or damage resulting from my participation in activities and performance of the Services and any A -V Recordings. ________________________________________________ ____ ___________________________ Signature of Visitor or Volunteer Date _____________________________________________________ Kitty Haven Sanctuary of Utah Representative Signature
perturbation.changed_text:
8. Assignment. This Agreement and the rights and obligations of either Party under this Agreement may be assigned or transferred only upon the prior written approval of the other Party hereto. The rights and obligations of the Parties hereto will inure to the benefit of, will be binding upon, and will be enforceable by the Parties hereto, their representatives and their permitted successors and assigns.

13. RELEASE. As consideration for being permitted by Kitty Haven to participate in activities and provide Services, I hereby agree that I, my assignees, heirs, distributees, guardians, and legal representatives will not make a claim against, sue, or attach the property of Kitty Haven Sanctuary of Utah for injury or damage resulting from any act, omission, negligence or other acts, howsoever caused, by any employee, agent, contractor, or representative of Kitty Haven as a result of my participation in activities and performance of the Services and any A -V Recordings. I here by release Kitty Haven from all actions, claims, or demands that I, my assignees, heirs, distributees, guardians, and legal representatives now have or may hereafter have for injury or damage resulting from my participation in activities and performance of the Services and any A -V Recordings. ________________________________________________ ____ ___________________________ Signature of Visitor or Volunteer Date _____________________________________________________ Kitty Haven Sanctuary of Utah Representative Signature
perturbation.explanation: Moving the Release clause to the 'Assignment' section makes it less conspicuous and buries it amidst legal jargon, potentially undermining its enforceability as a clear waiver of liability.
perturbation.law_explanation: Utah Code § 78B-4-501 requires that releases be clear, unambiguous, and explicitly state the intention to waive liability. Burying the release clause within an irrelevant section of the agreement may render it less clear and ambiguous, potentially undermining its enforceability under Utah law.
perturbation.justification: The perturbation introduces a structural flaw by moving the release clause to an 'Assignment' section, making it less conspicuous. The Law Explanation states that Utah Code § 78B-4-501 requires releases to be clear and unambiguous. Moving the clause undermines its clarity. Scraped Law Snippet 1 directly references this code, affirming its relevance. The changed text creates a legal contradiction by potentially rendering the release less enforceable due to its placement.
